name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provid...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provid...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provide the message you'd like me to copy or work with?\n\nIf you're looking to:\nCopy text from a file → Let me know the file path\nFormat or modify a message → Share the original text\nCreate a new message → Tell me what you need\n\nWhat would you like me to help you with?" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provide the message you'd like me to copy or work with?\nIf you're looking to:\nCopy text from a file → Let me know the file path\nFormat or modify a message → Share the original text\nCreate a new message → Tell me what you need\nWhat would you like me to help you with?"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your request. Could you please provide the message you'd like me to copy or work with?
  + 
    If you're looking to:
    Copy text from a file → Let me know the file path
    Format or modify a message → Share the original text
    Create a new message → Tell me what you need
  + 
    What would you like me to help you with?
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
